title: rhinanthus subalpinus
intro: Rhinanthus subalpinus, also known as the alpine beardtongue, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orobanchaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It has been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems and respiratory infections, due to its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve congestion. Rhinanthus subalpinus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
